allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\projects\\prompt-lib\\setup\\apply.py"\); $idx = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0xE2 -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x96 -and $bytes[$i+2] -eq 0x88\) { $idx = $i; break } }; "First U+2588 at byte offset: $idx"; "Surrounding bytes:"; $bytes[\($idx-5\)..\($idx+5\)] | ForEach-Object { "0x{0:X2}" -f $_ })
